title: Neill Blomkamp irks fans with his new AI-short film
excerpt: The sci-fi director joins the ranks of Darren Aronofsky and Elon Musk.
content_html:
Filmmaker Neill Blomkamp built his reputation on sci-fi films like the critically heralded District 9, and the divisive Chappie and Elysium. His latest, "Nightborne," a 13-minute short film generated almost entirely by artificial intelligence, is getting a largely negative reception.

Loosely adapted from the 2006 hard sci-fi novel Echopraxia, "Nightborne" was built using ByteDance's Seed 2.0 video model, which animated the faces and voices of 32 real people who signed likeness agreements. Per the video's own description, human artists produced the concept art, presumably so it could then be fed into the machine.

The plot of "Nightborne" follows a US Army pilot, who, after being shot down in the Middle East, is pronounced brain-dead and reanimated by the military as a mind-controlled super-soldier. There are also scenes of a journalist speaking with a film crew about his discoveries, as well as scenes of the scientist running the program.

You May Also Like

That the short turns real human beings into digital puppets to tell a story about the military turning a human being into a soulless killing machine is an irony apparently lost on Blomkamp and his collaborators.

Mashable Light Speed

Blomkamp's fans have not been kind in response. Comment sections on Instagram and YouTube skew heavily negative, with many mourning what they see as Blomkamp's fall from grace.

"Guys, be nice to Neill, he spent the entire afternoon prompting this," read one top comment on YouTube.

"It's actually impressive how you can throw this much talent at a project, and it still ends up looking like soulless slop," read another.

Whatever one thinks of AI-generated films on their own merits, Blomkamp now joins Darren Aronofsky as another high-profile director betting on generative AI as cinema's next act. That bet is facing real headwinds, considering Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey just posted a $100+ million opening weekend. A reminder that audiences are still very much willing to show up for something people actually made. Or you can watch the AI-generated version that Elon Musk wants to make.

sentences.en: That bet is facing real headwinds, considering Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey just posted a $100+ million opening weekend.

sentences.en: A reminder that audiences are still very much willing to show up for something people actually made.
sentences.zh: 提醒人们，观众仍然非常愿意观看人们实际制作的东西。

sentences.en: Or you can watch the AI-generated version that Elon Musk wants to make.
sentences.zh: 或者你可以观看埃隆·马斯克想要制作的人工智能生成的版本。

content_html_zh:
电影制片人尼尔·布洛姆坎普因科幻电影而声名鹊起，例如广受好评的《第九区》和引起争议的《超能查派》和《极乐世界》。 他的最新作品《夜之子》是一部几乎完全由人工智能制作的 13 分钟短片，但受到的反响很大程度上是负面的。

《夜之子》大致改编自 2006 年的硬科幻小说《Echopraxia》，采用字节跳动的 Seed 2.0 视频模型制作，该模型将 32 个签署肖像协议的真人的面孔和声音制作成动画。 根据视频本身的描述，人类艺术家制作了概念艺术，大概是为了将其输入机器中。

《夜之子》的剧情讲述了一名美国陆军飞行员在中东被击落后被宣布脑死亡，并被军方复活为一名受精神控制的超级士兵。 还有一名记者与电影摄制组谈论他的发现的场景，以及运行该项目的科学家的场景。

你可能也喜欢

这部短片将真人变成了数字木偶，讲述了军队将人类变成没有灵魂的杀人机器的故事，这对布洛姆坎普和他的合作者来说显然是一种讽刺。

可混搭光速

布洛姆坎普的粉丝并没有做出善意的回应。 Instagram 和 YouTube 上的评论部分严重负面，许多人对布洛姆坎普的失宠表示哀悼。

YouTube 上的一条热门评论写道：“伙计们，对尼尔好一点，他花了整个下午的时间来推动这一点。”

另一位读者写道：“你能在一个项目上投入如此多的人才，但它最终看起来仍然像毫无灵魂的废液，这确实令人印象深刻。”

无论人们如何看待人工智能生成的电影本身的优点，布洛姆坎普现在与达伦·阿罗诺夫斯基一起成为另一位备受瞩目的导演，押注生成人工智能将成为电影的下一幕。 考虑到克里斯托弗·诺兰 (Christopher Nolan) 执导的《奥德赛》(The Odyssey) 首周末首映票房就突破 1 亿美元，这一赌注面临着真正的阻力。 提醒人们，观众仍然非常愿意观看人们实际制作的东西。 或者你可以观看埃隆·马斯克想要制作的人工智能生成的版本。
